creator: freebsd-gnats@in-addr.com
text:
The comment for FETCH_ARGS in bsd.port.mk has an incorrect statement about the default flags for fetch

Fix: See patch (hopefully attached by http://www.freebsd.org/send-pr.html)

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: grep FETCH_ARGS /usr/port/Mk/bsd.port.mk
